'''Brevost''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Brevost system/Legends|Brevost system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was on the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] between the [[Krann system/Legends|Krann system]] and the [[Cerenia system/Legends|Cerenia system]].

==Appearances==
